economic_notes: OIB operates numerous business enterprises including campground, golf course, vineyards, convenience store, forestry, utilities, and ready-mix concrete. COVID-19 pandemic noted as having uncertain impact on operations. No budget prepared for 2021 due to COVID-19 unpredictability.
notes: Audit is qualified because investments in business enterprises (GBEs and GBPs) were subject to review engagement only, not audit. Prior period restatement: replacement reserve of $699,300 reclassified from accumulated surplus to deferred revenue/liability. OIB has 4 GBEs and 11 GBPs accounted for on modified equity basis. Consolidated entities include Inkameep Preschool/Day Care Society, OIB Housing Program, and Sen*Pok*Chin Education Society. expenses_education includes both Education ($1,376,841) and Sen*Pok*Chin Education ($1,840,722). No remuneration schedule included in extracted text. total_government_transfers includes ISC, Province of BC, Federal government, FNHA, Okanagan Training and Development, ONA, and CMHC.
